events.title: US Core PCE Price Index (MoM)
events.why_it_matters: The Fed s preferred inflation gauge. Higher than expected readings may lead to hawkish Fed policy and higher yields.

events.title: US GDP Growth
events.why_it_matters: Primary measure of economic health. Stronger growth supports equities but may fuel inflation.

events.title: US Jobless Claims
events.why_it_matters: Weekly indicator of labor market health. Surprises can shift Fed expectations on rate cuts.

events.title: CA Wage Growth
events.why_it_matters: Key input for BoC inflation targets. High growth suggests sticky inflation.
